title: sipi.bot
description: The Spend Firewall for AI Agents — approve, block, or flag every agent transaction before a dollar moves. Sits in front of every transaction an autonomous AI agent attempts and evaluates it against your rules in under 5ms. MCP, HTTP, and CLI integration. Flat $99/month.

items.title: sipi.bot — The Spend Firewall for AI Agents
items.content_text: Your autonomous AI agent has your credit card. sipi.bot approves, blocks, or flags every transaction against your rules — before a dollar moves. Spend controls for the agent economy.
